title: salix × wiegandii
intro: Salix × wiegandii, also known as Wiegand's willow, is a hybrid willow tree resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The bark and leaves of Salix × wiegandii contain salicin, a compound with medicinal properties that has been used to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Salix × wiegandii include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and pain reliever, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Salix × wiegandii include teas, tinctures, and salves made from the bark and leaves, which can be used to treat a variety of conditions.
